萄.origin: The grass top 艹 grows over 匋 — together they name the juicy grapes that hang on the vine.

sentence.en: I like to eat grapes.

照.origin: The bright 昭 part sits above four little fire dots 灬 — a fire that shines and lights everything up.

sentence.en: The sun shines on the earth.

架.origin: Add 加 something on top of wood 木 to make a stand or shelf for holding things up.

sentence.en: The books are all on the bookshelf.

甜.origin: A tongue 舌 next to something tasty 甘 — your tongue smiles because it tastes so sweet.

sentence.en: This watermelon is very sweet.

准.origin: Two ice drops 冫 by a bird 隹 — like a level checking that everything is exactly straight and accurate.

sentence.en: What you said is very accurate.

摘.origin: A hand 扌 reaches up to a branch 啇 to pick a fruit or pluck a flower.

sentence.en: He picked an apple.

够.origin: When 句 plus many 多 things pile up, you finally have enough — no more is needed.

sentence.en: There is already enough food.

垂.origin: Picture a tree with branches and leaves drooping down low, hanging and dangling toward the ground.

sentence.en: The willow branches hang down to the water.

丧.origin: A simpler way to write 喪 — people crying over someone who has gone 亡, showing deep sad mourning.

sentence.en: He is very dejected today.

励.origin: A steep cliff 厉 plus strength 力 — pushing yourself with power gives the courage to encourage others.

sentence.en: The teacher encourages us to read.

晨.origin: The sun 日 rises above 辰 the horizon — that's dawn, the fresh early morning.

sentence.en: The morning air is very fresh.

断.origin: An axe 斤 chops down hard and cuts something right through, so it snaps and breaks apart.

sentence.en: The tree branch broke.

武.origin: A foot 止 stepping out with a weapon 弋 — that's the strong, soldier-like power of the military.

sentence.en: He is learning martial arts.

章.origin: Music 音 with ten 十 parts joined together — like the chapters and sections that make up a whole piece.

sentence.en: This article is very interesting.

效.origin: Crossing 交 hands with a tap 攵 — when actions come together they make a real result and effect.

sentence.en: This method is very effective.

睛.origin: An eye 目 beside the blue-green 青 — your bright, shiny eyeball that sees the whole world.

sentence.en: Her eyes are very big.

补.origin: Cloth 衤 with a little patch 卜 — sewing a hole shut to fix and mend what is torn.

sentence.en: Mom mended my clothes.

拒.origin: A hand 扌 held up big 巨 like a wall — pushing something away to refuse it.

sentence.en: He refused this gift.

绝.origin: A thread 纟 beside 色 — snip the thread and it is completely cut off, gone for good.

sentence.en: She will never give up.

信.origin: A person 亻 standing by their words 言 — someone who keeps their word is someone you can trust.

sentence.en: I believe you.

求.origin: Picture two hands reaching out wide — stretching forward to seek and ask for what you really want.

sentence.en: He sought help from the teacher.

提.origin: A hand 扌 plus 是 — your hand grabs the handle and lifts the bag right up.

sentence.en: He is carrying a school bag.

驾.origin: Add 加 yourself onto a horse 马 — climb on and drive it forward down the road.

sentence.en: Dad is learning to drive.

繁.origin: Quick 敏 hands tangled with silk threads 糸 — so many threads it becomes busy and complex.

sentence.en: The city streets are very busy.

荣.origin: Grass 艹 and a tree 木 blooming under a roof 冖 — flourishing plants that bring glory and honor.

sentence.en: I feel proud of you.

强.origin: A bow 弓 plus 虽 — a tightly drawn bow shows great power, strong and full of energy.

sentence.en: His body is very strong.

所.origin: An axe 斤 by a door 户 — the spot where work happens marks the place or location.

sentence.cn: 这是我学习的地方所在。
sentence.en: This is the place where I study.

侨.origin: A person 亻 living tall and far away 乔 — someone who has moved abroad, an emigrant.

sentence.en: He is an overseas Chinese person.

集.origin: Birds 隹 settling together on a tree 木 — all gathering and collecting in one place.

sentence.en: The students gathered on the playground.

旧.origin: A line 丨 beside the sun 日 — something that has seen many suns is worn and old.

sentence.en: This book is very old.

岸.origin: A mountain 山 over a cliff 厂 by the water — that steep edge is the shore or coast.

sentence.en: The boat rests by the shore.

独.origin: A lone dog 犭 beside a little bug 虫 — staying by itself, alone and independent.

sentence.en: He walked home alone.

越.origin: A foot running 走 plus a weapon 戉 — leaping forward to cross over and surpass.

sentence.en: He crossed over the little river.

贴.origin: A shell of money 贝 plus 占 — press a stamp on tight, sticking and pasting it down.

sentence.en: She is sticking a picture on the wall.

笼.origin: Bamboo ⺮ woven above a dragon 龙 — thin bamboo strips bent into a basket or cage.

sentence.en: The bird is in the cage.

迎.origin: Walking 辶 toward 卬 someone arriving — stepping out to welcome and greet a guest.

sentence.en: Welcome to my home.

艘.origin: A boat 舟 beside 叟 — this is the counting word we use when we count ships.

sentence.en: There is a big ship on the sea.

载.origin: A cart 车 wrapped inside 哉 — a cart piled up with goods, carrying a heavy load.

sentence.en: The cart is loaded full of fruit.

航.origin: A boat 舟 beside 亢 — a sturdy vessel that sails far across the sea or sky.

sentence.en: The plane flies through the sky.

射.origin: A drawn bow-body 身 with a hand 寸 letting go — the arrow shoots out fast.

sentence.en: He shoots an arrow with a bow.
